zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles Haile Hill於1469年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特豪德斯同時，他的父親Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset47歲，母親Alice Stourton5歲。他和Agnes Brent至少有16個兒子和15個女兒。他去世於1547年4月30日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬比享年78歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 馬比。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

nameMeanings.name: Haile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hayley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which derives from a place name, probably Hailey in Oxfordshire, which was originally named from Old English hēg ‘hay’ + lēah ‘clearing’. Use as a given name began in the 1960s, inspired perhaps by the actress Hayley Mills ( b. 1946 ), daughter of Sir John Mills and Mary Hayley Bell , and enjoyed great popularity until the late 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles Haile Hill was born on 1 January 1469, in Houndstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, was 47 and his mother, Alice Stourton, was 5. He had at least 16 sons and 15 daughters with Agnes Brent. He died on 30 April 1547, in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giles Haile Hill est né le 1 janvier 1469, à Houndstone, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Alice Stourton, avait 5 ans. Il a eu au moins 16 fils et 15 filles avec Agnes Brent. Il est décédé le 30 avril 1547, à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Giles Haile Hill am 1. Januar 1469 in Houndstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset 47 und seine Mutter Alice Stourton 5. Er hatte mit Agnes Brent mindestens 16 Söhne und 15 Töchter. Er starb am 30. April 1547 im Alter von 78 Jahren in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Giles Haile Hill è nato il il 1 gennaio 1469 nel Houndstone, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Alice Stourton, aveva 5 anni. Lui avuto almeno 16 figli e 15 figlie con Agnes Brent. Morì il 30 aprile 1547, nel St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mabyn, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Giles Haile Hillが1469年1月1日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトホーウンドストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somersetは47歳，母Alice Stourtonは5歳であった。彼はAgnes Brentとの間に少なくとも16人の息子と15人の娘をもうけた。彼は1547年4月30日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マブインで78歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト マブインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles Haile Hill(이)가 1469년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 허운드스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Stourton(은)는 5세였다. 그는 Agnes Brent(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 4월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마빈에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 마빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giles Haile Hill nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1469, em Houndstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stourton, tinha 5 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 16 filhos e 15 filhas com Agnes Brent. Ele faleceu em 30 de abril de 1547, em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles Haile Hill родился 1 января 1469 г. в местности хоундстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stourton, 5. У него было по крайней мере 16 сыновей и 15 дочерей от Agnes Brent. Он умер 30 апреля 1547 г. в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giles Haile Hill nació el 1 de enero de 1469, en Houndstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Alice Stourton, tenía 5 años. Tuvo por lo menos 16 hijos y 15 hijas con Agnes Brent. Murió el 30 de abril de 1547, en St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
